name: Kartu Stok - Filter Barang, Filter Gudang, Filter Tanggal, Lihat Detail Mutasi
description: Test laporan kartu stok: filter by barang, filter by gudang, filter tanggal, lihat riwayat mutasi detail. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Kartu Stok menu in the sidebar
Kartu Stok page is visible with stock card/ledger view
Select a product from the product filter or search dropdown
Stock card shows the selected product mutation history
Select a warehouse from the gudang filter dropdown
Stock card filtered by selected warehouse
Set tanggal dari filter to first day of current month and tanggal sampai to today
Table shows stock mutations within the date range
Click on a mutation row to view detail if detail button is available
Mutation detail or reference document information is visible
